Editing:Untitled resume· auto-saved

Personal Information

Used in the header. Keep emails and links current.

Professional Summary

2–3 sentences. Let AI rewrite a rough draft into ATS-friendly prose.

Skills

Comma-separated. AI can suggest based on your title.

Work Experience

Reverse chronological. Use action verbs and metrics.

Projects

Helpful for engineers, creatives, and new grads.

Education

Certifications

Achievements

Languages
